name: Vegetable Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1 Heat oil in a large frying pan.
2 Add eggplant, tomatoes, and garlic. Cook, stirring often until the vegetables are soft.
3 Add zucchini, mushrooms, basil, oregano, salt, pepper, and Worcestershire sauce. Blend and continue cooking until almost all juice has evaporated.
4 Place the vegetable mixture in a large bowl to cool.
5 Beat 4 eggs with half of the Parmesan cheese using a wire whisk.
6 Pour over the vegetable mixture; blend well.
7 Spray a 10-inch quiche dish with nonstick cooking spray.
8 Pour half of the vegetable mixture into the quiche dish. Sprinkle the rest of the Parmesan cheese and half of the Mozzarella evenly over the mixture.
9 Pour in the balance of the vegetable mixture. Spread evenly and cover with the balance of Mozzarella cheese.
10 Bake in a 325-degree oven for 45 to 50 minutes. The quiche should be set and well browned. Cool. Serve hot or cold.
